title: Slabs to Blocks: Create
description: A mod that crafting recipes for making Create's copper slabs into their block variants.
body:
This preconfigured mod lets you craft your copper unused slabs from the Create mod back into their block variants, allowing you to not go through any config tabs to make the recipes yourself! All you need to do is simply place two slabs on top of each other in the crafting table!

![One of Create's copper slabs being turned back into a block varient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2b9181b072f39ea524888360bf0bd832ea404b.png)
